description_long: This nightstand features a classic design with a dark, ornately contoured wooden top and a lighter, cream-colored body. The front includes a single drawer adorned with a decorative carved motif and an open shelf above it, providing both storage and display space. The legs are elegantly curved in a cabriole style, adding a touch of vintage sophistication. The sides are framed with recessed panels, while the back is plain and finished in a matching dark wood tone. The drawer handle is an integrated carved pull, blending seamlessly with the decorative motif. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden build, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A vintage-style nightstand with a dark wooden top, cream body, curved cabriole legs, and a single drawer with a decorative carved pull.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf, single drawer with a carved motif and pull, and the ornate cabriole legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the recessed panel and the elegant curve of the cabriole leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark wood back panel and the straight alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a matching recessed panel and curved leg, mirroring the other side.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
